EnglishWord.title: EnglishWord
EnglishWord.description: Represents an English word and its Mongolian meaning for vocabulary learning.

id.description: Unique identifier for the English word entry.

mongolianMeaning.description: The Mongolian translation or meaning of the English word.

memorized.description: Indicates whether the user has memorized this word.

EnglishGrammarRule.title: EnglishGrammarRule
EnglishGrammarRule.description: Represents a grammar rule with explanation and example sentences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the grammar rule entry.

ruleName.description: The name of the grammar rule.

exampleSentences.description: Example sentences demonstrating the grammar rule.

JapaneseCharacter.title: JapaneseCharacter
JapaneseCharacter.description: Represents a Japanese character (Hiragana or Katakana) and its memorization status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Japanese character.

character.description: The Japanese character itself (e.g., あ, カ).

type.description: The type of Japanese character (Hiragana or Katakana).

memorized.description: Indicates whether the user has memorized this character.

JapaneseWord.title: JapaneseWord
JapaneseWord.description: Represents a Japanese word with Romaji, Mongolian meaning, and memorization status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Japanese word entry.

romaji.description: The Romaji representation of the Japanese word.

mongolianMeaning.description: The Mongolian translation or meaning of the Japanese word.

memorized.description: Indicates whether the user has memorized this word.

JLPTGrammar.title: JLPTGrammar
JLPTGrammar.description: Represents a JLPT grammar point with explanation and example sentences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JLPT grammar point.

grammarPoint.description: The JLPT grammar point (e.g., N5-1, N4-5).

explanation.description: Explanation of the JLPT grammar point.

exampleSentences.description: Example sentences demonstrating the JLPT grammar point.

ProgrammingConcept.title: ProgrammingConcept
ProgrammingConcept.description: Represents a programming concept with a short explanation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the programming concept.

topic.description: The name of the programming topic (e.g., JavaScript, HTML/CSS).

explanation.description: A short explanation of the programming concept.

CodeSnippet.title: CodeSnippet
CodeSnippet.description: Represents a code snippet with syntax and a copy button.

id.description: Unique identifier for the code snippet.

language.description: The programming language of the code snippet (e.g., JavaScript, HTML).

LearningProgress.title: LearningProgress
LearningProgress.description: Tracks the learning progress for a specific programming concept.

id.description: Unique identifier for the learning progress entry.

learned.description: Indicates whether the user has learned the concept.

practicing.description: Indicates whether the user is practicing the concept.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a project in the portfolio.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the project.

imageUrl.description: The URL of an image for the project.

Skill.title: Skill
Skill.description: Represents a skill category and a list of skills within it.

category.description: The category of the skills (e.g., 'Programming Languages').

skills.description: A list of skills in this category.
